trial_details.trajectory:
<result>
Diagnosis:
The pod "port-mismatch-deployment-b5cf5b8bc-6rpt9" in the "case5-test" namespace had a port mismatch issue. The container was exposing port 5000 but the deployment was expecting port 8080.

Fix:
1. Patched the deployment to update the container port to 8080:
```
kubectl patch deployment port-mismatch-deployment -n case5-test -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"containers":[{"name":"port-mismatch-app","ports":[{"containerPort":8080}]}]}}}}'
```
2. Deleted the problematic pod to force a new one to be created with the updated configuration:
```
kubectl delete pod port-mismatch-deployment-b5cf5b8bc-6rpt9 -n case5-test
```

FIX COMPLETE
</result>
